title: All recipe nutrition recalculation
summary: 전수 승격된 ingredient nutrition 결과를 사용해 `public.recipes` 전체의 current nutrition snapshot을 local-only batch로 재계산하고 complete/partial/unavailable report를 고정한다.
goal: 모든 recipe의 current nutrition snapshot을 결정론적으로 다시 계산하되 missing을 0으로 위장하지 않고 current switch, replay, rollback, historical Meal pin 안정성을 안전하게 닫는다.

owners.claude: replaced for this nutrition/products/planner successor slice by explicit user approval
owners.codex: role-separated Codex sessions own Stage 1 docs, Stage 1.5 independent docs review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend implementation, and Stage 3 independent review; no author or implementer self-approves

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/all-recipe-nutrition-recalculation.test.ts tests/all-recipe-nutrition-recalculation-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts tests/meals-route.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/all-recipe-nutrition-recalculation.test.ts tests/all-recipe-nutrition-recalculation-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts tests/meals-route.test.ts

out_of_scope: frontend ui or design authority work
public api shape schema or domain contract changes
new recipe state fields or new editable nutrition inputs
historical meal repinning or retrospective meal mutation
prepared food catalog planner aggregate or unrelated nutrition slices
staging or production writes without separate approval
notes: Stage 1 docs PR #1039 merged as eb61a6790482406e16316bf4cd75915b805070dd. BE/data-only high-risk manual merge only, and backend ownership closes at Stage 3 independent review rather than Stage 6 closeout. Current source of truth remains official v1.7.21/v1.5.27/v1.3.24/v1.3.22/v1.2.26. Allowed predecessor input is the merged recipe nutrition snapshot contract plus ingredient-nutrition-full-coverage PR #1038 merged at 3c737eae. Automated Stage 2 verification passed on 2026-07-18: focused Vitest, fresh isolated PostgreSQL 17 integration tests, workflow/source-of-truth validators, diff check, and pnpm verify:backend were green; Stage 3 repair added RED/GREEN coverage for the shared bounded inventory loader and required non-leaking --output contract, followed by fresh independent APPROVE with blocker 0. Manual loopback-only operator lifecycle evidence at docs/workpacks/all-recipe-nutrition-recalculation/evidence/2026-07-18-local-all-recipe-lifecycle.md closed inventory 34 = complete 8 + partial 23 + unavailable 3, replay writes 0, rollback 34, restored current aggregate state, and unchanged Meal pins. The recalculation path preserves immutable history, per-recipe atomic snapshot write/current switch/rollback, checkpointed bounded full-run recovery rather than a global transaction, unchanged API/schema/domain behavior, local-only execution guard, zero secret/raw/private-path exposure, and predecessor-only missing_reasons/canonical warnings_json taxonomy. Production/staging writes remain 0 and require separate approval.
